name: Contiguous Country Branch Income Exclusion

eligibility.description: Must be a domestic mutual life insurance company with a branch in Canada or Mexico that insures residents of that country and maintains separate accounting for that branch.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Domestic mutual life insurance companies can elect to exclude income, deductions, and assets of a branch operating in a contiguous country (Canada or Mexico) from their U.S. taxable income.
